validation.codeMaxLength: Sequence code must be at most 50 characters
validation.nameMaxLength: Sequence name must be at most 150 characters
validation.prefixMaxLength: Prefix must be at most 20 characters
validation.separatorMaxLength: Separator must be at most 5 characters
validation.dateFormatMaxLength: Date format must be at most 20 characters
validation.resetCycleInvalid: Invalid reset cycle. Allowed: DAILY, MONTHLY, YEARLY, NEVER
validation.paddingLengthMin: Padding length must be at least 1
validation.paddingLengthMax: Padding length must be at most 10
